name: limber
description_fr: Ce Pokémon ne peut pas être paralysé.  Si un Pokémon paralysé gagne ce talent, sa paralysie est soignée; également en regagnant un talent perdu en quittant le combat.
description_en: This Pokémon cannot be paralyzed.  If a Pokémon is paralyzed and acquires this ability, its paralysis is healed; this includes when regaining a lost ability upon leaving battle.
